channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: At the end of another stellar season, Ravens' Lamar Jackson will still face doubters in the playoffs
item.description: Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens return to the postseason with a lot of the same strengths they had a year ago.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Brittney Griner says new 3-on-3 league will 'put pressure' on WNBA to 'do better' by its players
item.description: With the 3-on-3 "Unrivaled" women's basketball league beginning this month, Brittney Griner says it could "put pressure" on the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NHL postpones LA Kings' home game against Calgary due to wildfires while NFL monitors situation
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NHL postponed the Los Angeles Kings' home game against the Calgary Flames on Wednesday with several massive wildfires burning across the greater Los Angeles area. The Kings and Flames were scheduled to play Wednesday night at the Kings' downtown arena.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Basketball: Canyon Hills 47, Crawford 39
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball on Tuesday night at Crawford with the Colts hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers win a very competitive defensive battle 47-39.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Outdoor hockey is coming to Florida. The NHL will have games in Miami and Tampa next season
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Hockey. Outdoors. In Florida. Next season, the NHL is making it happen — twice. The NHL announced Wednesday that the Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers will play host to the New York Rangers at loanDepot Park in Miami — home of baseball’s Marlins — on Jan.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tom Brady spoke to Bill Belichick about interest in Raiders head coach job: report
item.description: Tom Brady reportedly spoke to Bill Belichick to gauge his interest in becoming the Las Vegas Raiders head coach. Belichick is the head coach at North Carolina.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Big 12 MBB power ratings: Why the strength of the conference (relative to its peers) can be found at the bottom
item.description: Iowa State stayed on top of the latest Big 12 power ratings while Arizona jumped following its sweep of Cincinnati and West Virginia.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Matthew Seidler denies allegations of wrongdoing from wife of late Padres owner Peter Seidler
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — One of the brothers sued by the wife of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler for control of the team says her allegations of wrongdoing are untrue.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Thune tees up Tuberville's bill to block transgender athletes from women’s sports
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) on Tuesday took the necessary procedural steps to place Sen. Tommy Tuberville’s (R-Ala.) bill blocking transgender athletes from women’s sports on the Senate calendar. The step sets up a vote on Tuberville’s bill in the weeks ahead.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Penn State coach James Franklin calls for college football to have uniformity
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The Big Ten plays nine conference games in football. So does the Big 12. The Southeastern Conference and the Atlantic Coast Conference are among those playing eight-game league schedules. The Mountain West played a seven-game league slate. Notre Dame doesn't have a league.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A plot twist from what college football has become: A player who stayed
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — When Penn State moved a different linebacker into what had been Tyler Elsdon's starting spot, Elsdon made a choice that doesn't really fit into the storyline college football has been selling these days. He stayed right where he was.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Emeka Eneli, Diego Luna called to USMNT Camp after breakout seasons
item.description: Real Salt Lake midfielder Emeka Eneli and Diego Luna's stellar 2024 MLS campaigns have been rewarded with call-ups to the U.S. Men's National Team's January training camp, making a pivotal moment in their burgeoning careers.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Best of the West WBB power rankings: UCLA rolls on as Grand Canyon, UNLV rise and Stanford craters
item.description: The Bruins and Trojans are 9-0 (combined) in Big Ten behind star turns by Lauren Betts and JuJu Watkins.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Metcalfe, The Mercury News

item.title: All-Bay Area News Group high school football 2024: Running backs
item.description: St. Francis, California, St. Ignatius, De La Salle, Monte Vista, Liberty players among those recognized.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: St. Patrick names former Notre Dame star Tom Zbikowski head football coach
item.description: CHICAGO — One of the best safeties in Notre Dame's storied football program was named head coach of Saint Patrick High School. Tom Zbikowski, 39, will take over the Northwest Side high school's football program.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Final chapter: France's greatest coach Didier Deschamps says he'll leave after 2026 World Cup
item.description: Didier Deschamps announced Wednesday that he won’t continue as France coach after the next World Cup, bringing an end to an era in which he became the nation's most successful manager over more than a decade.
item.dc:creator: SAMUEL PETREQUIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Orioles pitcher Brian Matusz dead at 37
item.description: Former Baltimore Orioles pitcher Brian Matusz, a former starter who moved into the bullpen, has died at the age of 37, the team announced on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: West Virginia's Javon Small leads the Big 12 in scoring to fuel West Virginia's return to the Top 25
item.description: Javon Small was the best player on mediocre teams during his first three college seasons. Now he’s the Big 12’s leading scorer and a major reason why short-handed West Virginia is relevant again. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top-ranked Central girls wrestling is all about toughness and grit
item.description: Undefeated as a team to start the season, Central girls wrestling was just ranked 20th in the entire country by FloWrestling.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Indoor golf league created by Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy has a loud, swift debut match
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Ludvig Aberg will be the answer to a trivia question: He made the first birdie in TGL history. And with that, the indoor golf competition that Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy had envisioned for years was finally underway.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers coach JJ Redick says his family evacuated and people are 'freaking out' due to LA wildfires
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick said members of his family were among those in Southern California forced to evacuate their homes on Tuesday due to a wildfire that was being whipped by strong winds around Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: STEFAN STEVENSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Peter Seidler's brother responds to lawsuit over control of Padres
item.description: Matt Seidler, the brother of late Padres owner Peter Seidler, has responded to the lawsuit filed by Peter Seidler's widow over control of the team.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Column: Bears need leaders on the line alongside Caleb Williams in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — While the 2024 season was every single bit of a disaster, the Chicago Bears' win over the Green Bay Packers at Lambeau Field Sunday provided a glimmer of hope. It could also double as a springboard into a pivotal offseason.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to trade Gavin Lux to Reds: report
item.description: The post World Series shakeup continues in Los Angeles, as the Dodgers are poised to trade starting second-baseman Gavin Lux to the Cincinnati Reds. As reported by ESPN's Jeff Passan, the Dodgers will send Lux to the Reds in exchange for a future draft pick and outfield prospect Mike Sirota.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Zuckerberg taps UFC President Dana White for Meta's board of directors
item.description: (KRON) -- Meta founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg rings in the new year with several major personnel announcements. Three high-profile individuals have been named to join Meta's board of directors, including one of the most prominent figures in sports.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Peter Seidler's widow takes legal action in fight for control over the Padres
item.description: The widow of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler filed a legal complaint Monday against two of his brothers in a fight over who should control the Major League Baseball team.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Lawsuit alleges ex-Fox Sports host Skip Bayless harassed hairstylist, offered her $1.5 million for sex
item.description: The complaint claims Fox executives fostered a hostile work environment that allowed senior managers and on-air personalities including Bayless to abuse workers without fear of punishment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: NFL playoffs: Lions beat Vikings to secure NFC's No. 1 seed, finalize postseason field
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The final position in the NFL postseason field was settled in the final game of the regular season. The Detroit Lions earned their week off.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Allstate Sugar Bowl postponed
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Caesars Superdome was placed under lockdown Wednesday after a pickup truck drove into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens, city and federal officials said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Derrick Rose to open pop-up flower shop in the Loop Thursday
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Former Chicago Bull and NBA MVP Derrick Rose is opening a pop-up flower shop for one day only in the Loop Thursday. According to a post on Rose's Instagram account, "Rose's Flower Shop" will be open from 12-4 p.m. at 350 North State Street.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
